productDisplayName: Puma Men Archive Boot Wtr Black Casual Shoes
description: These Archive boot Wtr lifestyle boots from puma are a perfect choice for urban wear. These high profile shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and structure Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Leather lining for extra comfort Brand name printed on the tongue Appliqued suede formstripe panels on the sides Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Phylon midsole for lightweight design Outsole Thick rubber outsole with diagonal criss-cross grooves for better traction
